business_ideas.idea: Good American - luxury fashion brand (Emma Grede founder)
SKIMS - shapewear brand with massive scale
LegalZoom - celebrity partnership model with legal services (Brian Lee)
ShoeDazzle - subscription shoe service (2009, Kim Kardashian partnership)
The Honest Company - eco-friendly consumer goods (Jessica Alba partnership)
Beast Burger - ghost kitchen brand via Virtual Dining Concepts
Virtual Dining Concepts - celebrity restaurant brands via ghost kitchens
Earl Enterprises - portfolio of 30+ mid-tier restaurant brands
Pardon My Cheesesteak - ghost kitchen brand (Barstool partnership)
Guthy-Renker - infomercial and celebrity partnership media company

predictions.text: Celebrity ghost kitchen brands will consolidate; only strong operators with capital survive
Mid-tier restaurant portfolios (30+ locations) generate $500M revenue with high margins
